untranslatable_reason: This is an entry/exit condition rule, not a position sizing rule. It describes WHEN to re-enter a position (after consecutive exits + signal regeneration) and the logic for doing so, but contains no sizing parameters, risk percentages, multipliers, or volatility adjustments. The '$100 loss_magnitude_per_exit' is a descriptive parameter of past losses, not a sizing instruction. Position sizing rules specify HOW MUCH to risk per trade; this rule specifies WHETHER and WHEN to re-enter.
